title: Bugslayer
description:
As you're fending off a [jitter][red]swarm of aggressive insects[/red][/jitter] you suddenly notice a [gold]Mighty Rugged Warrior-Man[/gold] fighting beside you this whole time!

The insects, sensing defeat, scatter. You turn to your fellow fighter.
“Would you like any tips on exterminating these pests?”

How polite. You nod and accept his offer.
notes: This event presents two choices that lead to different post-choice screens before ending. Choosing "Learn Extermination Technique" shows: "I see... you wish to learn the [gold]Extermination Technique[/gold]. Very good..." followed by "THIS IS THE TECHNIQUE! BEHOLD!!" while he holds up a can of [green]Insecticide[/green]. Choosing "Learn Squash Technique" shows similar text but with him stepping on a giant bug instead. After either choice, the event ends with: "Silently the figure nods at you, and then walks away."
